Title: Registration validation missing phone field
Description: User could register with empty phone despite requirement
Root Cause: Missing backend validation on phone field

Title: JWT token mock not respecting expiration
Description: Mock JWT claims bypassed expiration in test
Remediation: Updated mock to validate expiration logic

Title: Escalation alert sent to wrong case manager
Description: Escalation notification included incorrect case manager email
Repro Steps: Escalate request with multiple case managers
Root Cause: Repository query selected first CM instead of assigned

Title: Campaign name not in donation confirmation subject
Description: Donor email subject generic vs campaign-specific
Repro Steps: Submit donation → Check inbox → Verify subject
Root Cause: Template variable {campaign_name} missing from subject template

Title: CSV export missing final row of data
Description: Last donation record omitted from exported CSV
Root Cause: Off-by-one error in CSV builder (line < size instead of <=)
Remediation: Fixed loop condition: for(int i=0; i<=records.size()-1; i++)
